title: Laila O Laila
subTitle: After his post-graduate studies, Karthik takes a holiday in Europe. On his return journey, he falls in love at first sight with Nandana, and goes to great lengths to win her heart.

title: Choron Ka Chor
subTitle: Choron Ka Chor

title: Colors Cineplex Superhit
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Hanuman vs. Mahiravana
subTitle: Lord Hanuman goes to save Goddess Sita and defeat the king of Lanka, Ravana. To defend his kingdom, Ravana unleashes his most powerful ally, his brother, Mahiravana.

title: Vishnu Shastra
subTitle: For the protagonist 'abbai' (Sree Vishnu), life is all about taking care of his elder sister and doting parents until they are all killed in a mysterious bomb blast. The plot follows this youngster going all out to avenge their deaths.

title: Jallikattu
subTitle: Kalan Varkey, a butcher, faces a lot of trouble when a buffalo he was supposed to slaughter goes astray and causes chaos in a remote village.

title: Tantra
subTitle: Rekha, a woman with the ability to perceive spirits, sees her life take a dark turn when she encounters a sinister black magic practitioner.

title: Pichaikkaran
subTitle: A rich businessman and a poor beggar's lives intersect, showing how money influences their fates as one fights off greedy predators and the other searches for his long-lost sister.

title: Gabbar Is Back
subTitle: The city's administration wrongs Aditya, a commoner. To avenge his tragedy, he disguises himself as a vigilante, Gabbar, and teams up with honest government officers to expose the corrupt.

title: Buddy
subTitle: Vishnu, a 17-year-old boy, born via IVF and raised by two women, becomes curious about his biological father. So, he sets out on a journey to find his father and connect with him.

title: The Return Of Lion
subTitle: When a social worker dies, his son must not only avenge his death but also prove his innocence when the welfare fund money accumulated by his family goes missing.

title: Surya Ka Yaarana
subTitle: A soldier going on a rescue mission, hears about his father's death by lung cancer and mournfully looks back on his memories of how he helped him in matters of love and life.

title: Surya Ka Yaarana
subTitle: A soldier going on a rescue mission, hears about his father's death by lung cancer and mournfully looks back on his memories of how he helped him in matters of love and life.

title: Veeram The Powerman
subTitle: A fearless young man vows to mend his violent ways after falling in love with a beautiful maiden. However, he is forced to resort to violence after a gang of nefarious criminals pursue his lady love.

title: Intelligent
subTitle: DSP Ranjith Kalidoss battles both a serial killer and his own Parkinson's disease. However, his pursuit exposes a more elaborate and sinister scheme than he initially suspected.

title: Main Hi Raja Main Hi Mantri
subTitle: A moneylender is living a happily married life. However, when his wife is insulted by the village sarpanch's wife, he focuses all of his energy on becoming a powerful politician.

title: Khatarnak Policewala
subTitle: After a priest's murder and a woman's abduction, ACP Vetrimaaran uncovers a ring linked to a fertility clinic. His investigation takes a personal turn when the conspiracy affects his own family.

title: Siren
subTitle: After serving 14 years in prison, a man is released on parole. As he tries to reconnect with his family, he vows revenge against those who wronged him.

title: Mission 118
subTitle: An investigative journalist has nightmares about a young woman's murder and tries to uncover whether his dreams have any connection to reality.

title: Ugram
subTitle: Shiva, a reckless CI officer, often lands himself in trouble. However, his impulsive actions take a dark turn when his family goes missing from a hospital after an accident.

title: Kabzaa - The Mafia Raaj
subTitle: Vijay Chandra, a determined police aspirant, battles a local MLA's corrupt efforts to seize his family's land. Joined by other wronged citizens, he takes a stand for justice and honor.

title: Kabzaa - The Mafia Raaj
subTitle: Vijay Chandra, a determined police aspirant, battles a local MLA's corrupt efforts to seize his family's land. Joined by other wronged citizens, he takes a stand for justice and honor.

title: Action Blaster
subTitle: Anil Anto, a TV operator, moves to Kochi with his pregnant wife in order to start a new life. There, Anil crosses paths with Darvin, a gangster, post an unfortunate incident.

title: Bunglow No 17
subTitle: Gautham and Deeksha, along with their daughter, move into an isolated bungalow gifted to them by Gautham's father. Soon, they start experiencing paranormal activities around the house.
